title: Malaysian Fermented Noodle Dish
description: A spicy and sour Malaysian noodle dish made with fermented ingredients, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the sliced chili peppers and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the fermented soybean paste and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the cooked noodles, bean sprouts, soy sauce, and sambal oelek (if using). Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated.
Transfer the noodles to a serving platter. Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
Optional: Serve with additional chili peppers or sambal oelek on the side for added heat.
